theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Brutalist Luxury Variant
theme_and_archetype.description: Ultra premium, minimal, strictly black & white color palette. Apple-level design quality with cinematic, high-contrast aesthetics. It emphasizes trust, premium quality, and transformation.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight uppercase

spacing_and_layout.layout_mode: Mode A: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetrical, High Tension)
spacing_and_layout.notes: Generous spacing. Break symmetry. Use 'p-8' on bordered containers.

surfaces_and_effects.navigation: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 border-b border-white/10
surfaces_and_effects.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile variant in dark mode: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all
surfaces_and_effects.buttons: Invert Hover: bg-white text-black hover:bg-transparent hover:text-white border border-white transition-colors duration-300

loading_screen.style: Minimalist black screen, white Velstrax logo reveal, subtle fade out

animations.page_transitions: Fade and slight blur on enter
animations.scroll_reveal: opacity-0 translate-y-8 to opacity-100 translate-y-0 with stagger
animations.micro_interactions: Button morphing (scale down 0.98 on tap), image grayscale to color or slight scale on hover

hero.visuals: Abstract 3D glass waves background with overlay
hero.overlay: bg-black/60 to ensure white text readability

services.layout: Bento Grid (Asymmetrical, tall and square blocks)
services.interactions: Hover to reveal detail or slight border glow

how_it_works.layout: Vertical timeline or horizontal sliding cards with bold numbering
how_it_works.typography: Massive step numbers (text-8xl text-white/10 absolute behind text)

portfolio.cards: Image heavy, black/white transformation focus, subtle hover zoom

contact.layout: Split screen (Left: Big typography, Right: Form)
contact.form: Shadcn based, purely minimalist inputs (border-b only, no full boxes), bg-transparent

admin_dashboard.style: Pure utility, Shadcn components, dense data view, #0A0A0A background

image_urls.description: Ultra premium abstract 3D glass waves on black background
High end minimalist laptop mockup on a dark desk
Abstract black and white dark mode geometric sphere
Grayscale photo of low angle view of building

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='contact-submit-button'). Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js files for React components, do not use .tsx
Enforce 'use client' on components heavily utilizing Framer Motion or Hooks.
Implement Lenis for smooth scroll on the main layout.
Do NOT use placeholder text or placeholder image URLs. Rely strictly on the media URLs provided.
Ensure all inputs and buttons have high contrast focus states.
Implement a language toggle component managing Greek/English state globally.
